title: Columnea robusta
intro: Columnea robusta, also known as the Goldfish Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Columnea robusta include iridoid glycosides, alkaloids, and flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The most common herbal preparations made with Columnea robusta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin infections.
